label: agentic-ide-bridge-server
description: Root launch surface for the Agentic IDE bridge server that exposes registry, file IO, runtime execution, runtime tests, and local inference proxy endpoints.

inputs.name: bridge_request
inputs.description: Incoming HTTP request for registry, runtime, file, or inference endpoints.

outputs.name: bridge_response
outputs.description: HTTP response containing registry data, file content, runtime output, or inference results.

errors.description: Bridge server process is not running or did not bind its port.
The bridge is online but the configured llama.cpp endpoint is unavailable.
